swe.summary: Software Engineer with 1.5 years of professional experience in Agile full-stack development, including freelance projects. Proficient in building robust back-ends with {{primary_stack}} and dynamic front-ends using TypeScript, React, and Tailwind CSS. Experienced in managing Relational and NoSQL databases while leveraging AWS with automated CI/CD pipelines to deliver scalable solutions, utilizing unit testing to ensure high code quality and system reliability.

fullstack.summary: Full-Stack Software Engineer with 1.5 years of professional experience delivering end-to-end web applications in Agile environments, including freelance projects. Skilled in building scalable back-ends with {{primary_stack}} and responsive, data-driven front-ends using TypeScript, React, and Tailwind CSS. Experienced with Relational and NoSQL databases, RESTful API design, and AWS-hosted deployments with CI/CD automation.

ai_engineer.summary: Software Engineer with 1.5 years of professional experience building AI-integrated applications in Agile environments. Proficient in developing back-end services with {{primary_stack}} that orchestrate LLM APIs and agentic workflows, paired with dynamic front-ends in TypeScript and React. Hands-on experience with prompt engineering, real-time data pipelines, and deploying AI-driven features on AWS infrastructure.

devops.summary: Software Engineer with 1.5 years of professional experience and an AWS Certified Solutions Architect Associate credential. Experienced in containerizing and deploying applications to AWS ECS, automating CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions, and building event-driven architectures with Lambda and SQS. Skilled in monitoring and observability with CloudWatch, and proficient in back-end development with {{primary_stack}} to support infrastructure work.

skill_bolding_rules.description: Gemini reads the JD and bolds matching skills from the list. The first item in each list is the primary skill and is always bolded for the chosen stack. Additional items are bolded only if they appear in the JD. Gemini also reorders items so JD-matching skills appear earlier in the list.

soft_skills.description: Up to 2 soft skill bullets injected before the second experience block when the keyword appears in the JD.
